Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl

Class SymbolicLayout

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl.AbstractElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl.SymbolicLayout
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISymbolicElement, ISymbolicLayout
public class SymbolicLayout extends AbstractElement implements ISymbolicLayout
Default implementation of ISymbolicLayout.
